selected_parcel_workflow_status.new_construction_context_note: New construction statistics endpoint is live. The selected parcel workflow currently surfaces permit events and permit segmentation rather than a separate selected-parcel new-construction label panel.

map_layer_qa_status.flood_constraints: Control visible; endpoint healthy; legend explains severe/high/moderate markers.
map_layer_qa_status.fema_flood_zones: Control visible; endpoint healthy; legend and severity/limit controls visible.
map_layer_qa_status.school_utilization_seed: Control visible; endpoint healthy; legend and caveat wording visible.
map_layer_qa_status.county_boundary: Visible by default as the operating extent reference.
map_layer_qa_status.parcel_intelligence: Available as a reference layer, off by default.
visual_cleanup_applied: Visible layer source badges now display API, Reference, Placeholder, or Disabled instead of raw mock status.
Legacy layer descriptions were softened to reference or placeholder language for demo clarity.
map_layer_qa_status.remaining_manual_check: A click-by-click automated layer toggle pass was partially limited by in-app browser navigation timeouts after the main mode checks. API health and visible controls were verified; do a final human visual toggle pass immediately before a live demo.

approved_wording_visible: Internal ranking research and model QA

validation_results.backend_validation: not run because Phase 11A did not change backend code

remaining_blockers: Run a final human visual toggle pass for Development Hotspots, Flood Constraints, FEMA Flood Zones, and School Utilization Seed immediately before a live stakeholder demo.
Selected parcel new-construction context is available through existing permit events/statistics, but not yet as a dedicated selected-parcel new-construction label card.
Placeholder readiness layers remain conceptual and should be presented carefully.
recommended_next_phase: Phase 11B: release-candidate polish pass focused on final manual visual QA, optional screenshot capture, and commit packaging for the demo branch/main.
